ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the author */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the author */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is on */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_utc" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the social media platform */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for accessing the social media platform */,
  "access_token" TEXT /* Access token for accessing the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment */,
  "created_utc" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the post */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the post */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views of the post */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencers" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influencer */,
  "influencer_name" TEXT /* Name of the influencer */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the influencer */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the influencer */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the influencer (e.g., fashion, technology) */,
  "average_post_frequency" INTEGER /* Average frequency of posts by the influencer per day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencers_influencer_name FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_name") REFERENCES authors ("author_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the trend */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the trend (e.g., news, entertainment) */,
  "related_keywords" TEXT /* Related keywords of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "positive_sentiment" REAL /* Positive sentiment score of the post */,
  "negative_sentiment" REAL /* Negative sentiment score of the post */,
  "neutral_sentiment" REAL /* Neutral sentiment score of the post */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Overall sentiment score of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "natural_language_processing" (
  "nlp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NLP entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "entities" TEXT /* Entities extracted from the post */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords extracted from the post */,
  "named_entities" TEXT /* Named entities extracted from the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nlp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualization" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used for the visualization */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the visualization image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)
